economic_notes: Commercial fisheries (snow crab, lobster), forestry program, oyster project, aquaculture, peat moss, pharmacy (Maologetinetj Dev. Corp.), River of Fire Market, Elsipogtog Resort, KIJU-SNOW CRAB operations
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022. 8 entities listed in reporting entity: 1 fully consolidated (Big Cove Wellness Committee Inc.) and 7 government business enterprises on modified equity basis (MicMac Industries of Big Cove Inc., McGraw Seafood (2008) Inc., 690761 NB Inc./River of Fire Market, Maologetinetj Dev. Corp. Inc./Elsipogtog Pharmacy, 711394 NB Inc., McGraw Peat Moss, McGraw Aquaculture). Net debt position of $40,637,726. Large increase in long-term debt from $30M to $47.5M. Intangible assets of $30,265,000 likely fishing licenses (acquired $18,515,000 in year). 711394 NB Inc. had equity loss of $4,351,432 in 2022. Deferred revenue closing balance of $34,569,834 netted in revenue presentation. OSR calculation: total revenue $100,074,905 minus ISC $41,761,367 minus Health Canada $11,480,375 minus DFO $875,295 minus CMHC $313,732 minus Province of NB $1,311,995 = $44,332,141. Remuneration schedules referenced on pages 101-102 but not provided in images.
